g.text: Step 2: Federation Authority Validation and Certificate Issuance
Apply metadata policies with cascading effect
Step 3: Entity Configuration Update and Resolve Request
- Add x5c claim with certificate chain
Step 4: Resolve Response and Onboarding Completion
Generate Federation Trust Mark for entity
Include Trust Mark in Subordinate Statement
Generate signed JWT with trust chain,
validated metadata and applying metadata policies
Extract Trust Mark from Subordinate Statement
Integrate Trust Mark in Entity Configuration
Error response with issues to resolve
